title: stipa × majalis
intro: Stipa × majalis, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of ornamental grass native to North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa × majalis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by drying the leaves and stems of the plant.
